title: Order status updates & audit trail
description: Admin updates order status through the fulfillment workflow (processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled) with an audit trail of changes.

inScope: Order status transitions: pending_payment → processing → shipped → delivered (plus cancelled)
Audit trail recording each status change
outOfScope: Automated status transitions triggered by carrier tracking webhooks (not stated)

acceptanceCriteria.text: Admin can move an order through processing → shipped → delivered
Every status change is recorded in an audit trail with who/when
